column6: Which course is this assessment given in?
column7: Provide a brief description of the assessment, e.g. "Final exam question"
column8: Upload a PDF document that contains the assessment prompt or a complete description of the assignment.
column9:
Which performance indicator does this assessment address? 
You may select only one here. If your course is used to assess more than one performance indicator, please fill out the form a second time.
column10: Exceeds expectations: Accomplishes tasks on time, and helps team members accomplish their roles.
column11: Meets Expectations: Accomplishes tasks on time.
column12: Developing: Accomplishes assigned tasks but is delayed or requires reminders
column13: Unsatisfactory: Does not accomplish assigned tasks
column14: Exceeds expectations: Drives team activities and motivates productive engagement from others
column15: Meets Expectations:  Actively involved in team activities and encourages engagement from others
column16: Developing: Involved in team activities, and makes some effort to engage others
column17: Unsatisfactory: No or negative involvement in team activities.
column18: Exceeds Expectations: Develops goals and a resilient task plan that results in exceeding the assignment expectations.
column19: Meets Expectations:  Develops goals and a task plan that results in meeting the assignment expectations.
column20: Developing: Develops goals and tasks that are infeasible, or that required substantial revision
column21: Unsatisfactory: Fails to identify reasonable goals or appropriate tasks.
